metadata.title: Appointment Scheduling | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered appointment scheduling platform for all your booking operations — from online appointments and calendar integration to reminders, video calls, and customer booking pages.

hero.title: Scheduling
hero.description: Generate appointments, schedule resources, manage meetings, reminders, video calls, and customer booking pages from one smart system.

availabilitySection.title: Appointments, at your
availabilitySection.subtitle: customers fingertips
availabilitySection.description: Scheduling made easy. Access a free platform to schedule, discuss, and share availabilities with your customers.

setupSection.title: Set
setupSection.description: Configure templates, upload availability, publish your booking page, and sync it with your Google Calendar, Outlook, and more.

opportunitySection.title: Never miss out on an
opportunitySection.description: Use appointment scheduling to transform every conversation into an opportunity, meeting, lead, or customer relationship.

onlineSchedulingSection.title: Online appointment
onlineSchedulingSection.description: Manage appointment scheduling with automated forms, custom questions, and a simple booking experience for customers.

reportingSection.title: Reporting:
reportingSection.description: Optimize your resources based on time constraints and discover how customers interact with your booking flow.
reportingSection.floatingNote: Appointment reporting has never been easier

optionsSection.title: Appointments loaded
optionsSection.description: Set your schedule, manage appointment configuration, and communication messages. Each booking can include extra options and custom questions.

remindersSection.title: Send calendar alarms
remindersSection.subtitle: or reminders
remindersSection.description: Get into contact reminders using customized text messages, WhatsApp notifications, and email reminders so everyone shows up on time.

demo.title: Reminder message
demo.subtitle: Sent 24 hours before
demo.message: Hi Anita, this is a reminder for your appointment tomorrow at 10:30 AM. Reply CONFIRM to keep your booking.

features.title: Plan and select
features.description: Online appointments from any compatible device.

features.title: Manage time with ease
features.description: Set employee schedules and manage resources like rooms.

features.title: Calendar integration
features.description: Fully integrated with the Adon Calendar app.

features.title: Leads / Opportunities
features.description: Create records in your CRM from scheduled meetings.

features.title: Professional communication
features.description: Use clear confirmation and reminder emails.

features.title: Customer choices
features.description: Let customers choose options that fit their needs.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: By improving CRM-related features, Enadysim estimates management and efficiency in the appointment process.
testimonial.name: Milan Ayala
